profile.name: The Prism Warden
profile.combat_role: radiant striker and protective field controller
profile.aura: prismatic light bending around hard-light armor plates
profile.background: storm-lit rooftop relay with rain, sparks, and skyline silhouettes

fixtures.costume: armored hooded suit with cracked gold mask and glowing prism seams
fixtures.prompt:
Create premium American superhero comic-book character art for a new original hero named The Prism Warden.
FULL BODY REVEAL STANDARD: show the complete character from head to toe, full costume visible, heroic stance, no cropped portrait, no bust-only portrait, no face-only portrait.
STYLE: premium American superhero comic-book aesthetic, bold inked linework, dramatic cinematic lighting, cover-art composition, heroic costume design.
ARCHETYPE: Lightbound Guardian.
BUILD TYPE: lean athletic.
CUSTOM COSTUME DIRECTION: armored hooded suit with cracked gold mask and glowing prism seams.
CUSTOM PERSONALITY / ATTITUDE: haunted survivor with controlled intensity.
POWERS TO VISUALLY SHOWCASE: Laser Light, Hard Light, Energy Absorption.
ABILITY SHOWCASE MODE: active effects; show abilities through visible effects, pose, costume motifs, aura, and environmental reaction.
COMBAT ROLE: radiant striker and protective field controller.
AURA / EFFECTS: prismatic light bending around hard-light armor plates.
POSE DIRECTION: full-body heroic reveal, readable silhouette, feet visible, hands visible, power effects visible, costume readable.
BACKGROUND ENERGY: storm-lit rooftop relay with rain, sparks, and skyline silhouettes.
COMPOSITION: full-body reveal, complete head-to-toe superhero design, readable silhouette, costume and abilities visible in one image.
AVOID: logos from existing franchises, copyrighted superhero symbols, text labels, watermarks, UI panels, internal mechanics, score tables, dice rolls, probability language, backend data.
